clickhouse:position-deletes:v2.notes: Reading V2 tables with position deletes is supported via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach).
caveats: Read-only via table functions; no write support

clickhouse:position-deletes:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Reading is supported via Table Function (icebergS3/icebergLocal). Confirmed via GitHub PR #75930 and ClickHouse engineers; not yet reflected in official documentation.
caveats: Not yet reflected in official documentation
Read-only via table functions; no write support

clickhouse:equality-deletes:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Reading merge-on-read tables with both position deletes and equality deletes is supported via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach). Deletion vectors (V3) are not supported.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; no write support

clickhouse:merge-on-read:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 deletion vectors are not supported.

clickhouse:copy-on-write:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; cannot write using copy-on-write strategy.

clickhouse:copy-on-write:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; V3 not supported.

clickhouse:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Reading schema-evolved Iceberg tables is supported via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach): add/remove columns, reorder, nullable promotion, and limited type casting (int→long, float→double, decimal widening). Cannot change nested structures or array/map element types.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; cannot perform schema changes
No nested structure or array/map element type evolution
Requires allow_dynamic_metadata_for_data_lakes = true for post-creation schema changes

clickhouse:schema-evolution:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature

clickhouse:column-default-values:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature

clickhouse:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Reading hidden-partitioned Iceberg tables with partition pruning is supported via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach). Enable with use_iceberg_partition_pruning = 1.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; cannot create or modify partitioning
Requires use_iceberg_partition_pruning = 1 to enable partition pruning

clickhouse:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Reading partition-evolved Iceberg tables via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach) is not explicitly documented.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; cannot modify partitioning

clickhouse:partition-evolution:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature

clickhouse:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:time-travel:v2.notes: Time travel is supported via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach) using iceberg_timestamp_ms and iceberg_snapshot_id query settings.
caveats: Cannot specify both iceberg_timestamp_ms and iceberg_snapshot_id in the same query

clickhouse:time-travel:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:table-maintenance:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; no table maintenance operations are supported.

clickhouse:table-maintenance:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; no table maintenance operations are supported.

clickhouse:branching-tagging:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions does not support branching and tagging.

clickhouse:branching-tagging:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions does not support branching and tagging.

clickhouse:read-support:v2.notes: Full read support for Iceberg V1 and V2 tables via the icebergS3/icebergAzure/icebergHDFS/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach). Supports S3, Azure, HDFS, and local storage.

clickhouse:read-support:v3.notes: ClickHouse currently supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 only via table functions; V3 support is not yet available.

clickhouse:write-insert:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions (icebergS3/icebergLocal) is read-only; no INSERT support.

clickhouse:write-insert:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; no MERGE/UPDATE/DELETE support.

clickhouse:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:catalog-integration:v2.notes: ClickHouse supports multiple catalog types via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach) and the experimental DataLakeCatalog database engine: REST Catalog, AWS Glue, Unity Catalog, and Polaris (via REST).
caveats: No Hive Metastore, Nessie, Hadoop, or JDBC catalog support

clickhouse:catalog-integration:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:hive-metastore:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Hive Metastore as a catalog.

clickhouse:hive-metastore:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Hive Metastore as a catalog.

clickhouse:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: AWS Glue Data Catalog is supported via the icebergS3 table function (recommended approach) with storage_catalog_type='glue', and also via the experimental DataLakeCatalog engine with catalog_type='glue'.
caveats: Currently only supports access key authentication for Glue

clickhouse:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:rest-catalog:v2.notes: Iceberg REST Catalog is supported via the icebergS3 table function (recommended approach) with storage_catalog_type='rest', and also via the experimental DataLakeCatalog engine with catalog_type='rest'.

clickhouse:rest-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:nessie:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Nessie catalog.

clickhouse:nessie:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Nessie catalog.

clickhouse:polaris:v2.notes: Polaris is accessible via the REST Catalog API using the icebergS3 table function (recommended approach) with storage_catalog_type='rest', or via the experimental DataLakeCatalog engine.

clickhouse:polaris:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Unity Catalog is accessible via the icebergS3 table function (recommended approach) with storage_catalog_type='rest', or via the experimental DataLakeCatalog engine.

clickhouse:unity-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Hadoop catalog.

clickhouse:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support Hadoop catalog.

clickhouse:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support JDBC catalog.

clickhouse:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg table functions do not support JDBC catalog.

clickhouse:table-creation:v2.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; creating Iceberg tables is not supported.

clickhouse:table-creation:v3.notes: ClickHouse Iceberg integration via table functions is read-only; creating Iceberg tables is not supported.

clickhouse:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant Type is a V3 feature

clickhouse:variant-type:v3.notes: ClickHouse V3 variant type support is not yet documented

clickhouse:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded Variant is a V3 feature

clickhouse:shredded-variant:v3.notes: ClickHouse V3 shredded variant support is not yet documented

clickhouse:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry Type is a V3 feature

clickhouse:geometry-type:v3.notes: ClickHouse V3 geometry type support is not yet documented

clickhouse:lineage:v3.notes: ClickHouse V3 lineage support is not yet documented

clickhouse:statistics:v2.notes: ClickHouse reads column statistics from Iceberg manifest files for file pruning during scan planning via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach). Read-only; cannot write Iceberg tables.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; cannot write Iceberg tables or statistics

clickhouse:statistics:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:bloom-filters:v2.notes: ClickHouse does not support reading Iceberg Parquet-level bloom filters or Puffin-based bloom filter statistics via table functions. ClickHouse has its own bloom filter index types but they do not apply to external Iceberg tables.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; no bloom filter support

clickhouse:bloom-filters:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:type-promotion:v2.notes: ClickHouse can read Iceberg tables that have undergone type promotion (int→long, float→double, decimal precision widening) via the icebergS3/icebergLocal table functions (recommended approach). Cannot perform type promotion itself — that must be done by another engine (e.g. Spark). Nested structure and array/map element type changes are not supported.
caveats: Read-only via table functions; cannot perform type promotion
No nested structure or array/map element type evolution
Type promotion must be performed by another engine

clickhouse:type-promotion:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 is not yet supported.

clickhouse:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: ClickHouse supports REST catalog via the IcebergCatalog table function. Connection to Snowflake Horizon Catalog follows the same REST catalog configuration.
caveats: REST catalog support available but with configuration complexity
Feature set may be limited compared to native catalog integrations

clickhouse:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: ClickHouse V3 Iceberg support is not yet documented; REST catalog connectivity pattern unchanged.
caveats: V3 support not yet documented in ClickHouse

clickhouse:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

clickhouse:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: ClickHouse only supports reading Iceberg V1 and V2 via table functions; V3 deletion vectors are not supported.
